ocr_findings.description: Heading '処理形態によるシステムの分類' OCR-ed as '处理形態によるシステムの分類' — simplified Chinese character '处' substituted for Japanese '処'. Changes appearance of key term.

The diagram '10章～12章の全体像' is partially captured as an image placeholder; diagram node labels (コンピュータ, ディスプレイ, プリンター, 入出力インタフェース, OS, アプリケーションソフトウェア, ハードウェア, ソフトウェア, システム, 10章, 11章, 12章) are not in OCR text. Diagram is structural illustration, not pure text, so severity is low.

reviewer_notes: Existing label is 'chapter_title' but the image shows a Lesson 10-01 page with substantial body text (two full paragraphs of learning content), a sidebar story box with paragraph text, and a large structural diagram with node labels. This exceeds the threshold for chapter_title (big heading + small intro only); reviewer classifies as 'content'. The wrong_char error on '処→处' is a medium-severity OCR substitution affecting a key heading term.
